'''''Bright Seeker''''' was a modified [[Mining Survey Ship]] which was designed to survey [[Star system/Legends|systems]] for mineral and ore deposits. It had excellent sensors and a powerful laser for boring into [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] and taking samples. ''Bright Seeker'' was commanded by the minor [[Noble/Legends|noble]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nils Wender]] of [[House Calipsa]].
